steps.title: Identify where to find the comparison data
steps.content: The student needs to find Nambé Pueblo's area in the table to complete the sentence comparing it with Taos Pueblo's 156.2 square miles.

steps.title: Locate Nambé Pueblo in the table
steps.content: Nambé Pueblo is listed in the table with a total area of 32.4 square miles. The other three choices represent areas of different Pueblo nations—Pueblo de San Ildefonso, Santa Clara Pueblo, and Pueblo of Acoma. That matches Choice C — 32.4 square miles..
